medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Cf:
The configuration of HLS Basic Put Settings.

The parent of this entity is HlsCdnSettings.

medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Co.Description: The number of seconds to wait before retrying a connection to the CDN if the connection is lost.

medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Fi.Description: The size, in seconds, of the file cache for streaming outputs.

medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Nu.Description: The number of retry attempts that MediaLive makes before the channel is put into an error state.

medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Re.Description: If a streaming output fails, the number of seconds to wait until a restart is initiated. A value of 0 means never restart.
